last_action: T005 complete — specCommands.test.ts updated with lifecycle-aware makeItem, readSpecContextSync mock, and three new no-op-filter / lifecycle-viewItem cases. All 410 tests pass; full suite and tsc green.
decisions: Standardized right-click menu titles in CP1 review: dropped 'Spec' suffix from Delete and Archive; renamed 'Move to Active' → 'Reactivate' for verb consistency. Mark as Completed unchanged.
Group-header right-click bulk actions deferred to follow-up issue #146 to keep this PR scoped to the menu-race fix.

T001.did: Added exported helpers lifecycleContextValue() and isSpecLifecycleItem() in specExplorerProvider.ts; switched the group-expansion SpecItem construction to lifecycleContextValue(specContext); replaced both === 'spec' branches in getChildren and the SpecItem icon-selection branch with isSpecLifecycleItem() calls.
concerns: FeatureWorkflowContext.status is typed as SpecStatus (active|completed|archived) and does not include 'tasks-done'. lifecycleContextValue widens to string before switching so the SpecStatuses.TASKS_DONE case stays reachable for legacy specs that may carry that value. If R001's tasks-done branch is critical, consider widening SpecStatus to include 'tasks-done' in a follow-up.

T002.did: Replaced six context-menu when clauses in package.json: markCompleted now matches spec-active||spec-tasks-done; archive uses regex /^spec-(active|tasks-done|completed)$/; reactivate matches spec-completed||spec-archived; delete (inline + 7_modification), reveal, and the spec revealInExplorer entry use the four-value lifecycle regex. spec-document-* and spec-related-doc entries untouched.

T003.did: specCommands.ts: imported isSpecLifecycleItem, readSpecContextSync, SpecStatuses; resolveTargets now filters via isSpecLifecycleItem; runBulkStatusChange takes a skipIf predicate, reads status via readSpecContextSync and drops no-op targets before apply; markCompleted/archive/reactivate callers pass the appropriate skipIf.

T004.did: selectionContextKeys.ts: dropped allActive/allCompleted/allArchived setContext writes and their predicates; recomputed mixed inline from groupCount; kept count/mixed writes; added a header comment about the new role. Post-fix on parent thread: filter changed from contextValue === 'spec' to isSpecLifecycleItem so count/mixed keep working with the new viewItems.
concerns: Subagent left the spec-filter using === 'spec' which would have produced count=0 for every selection now that items emit lifecycle viewItems. Fixed on the parent thread by importing isSpecLifecycleItem from specExplorerProvider.

T005.did: specCommands.test.ts: extended jest.mock('./specExplorerProvider') to expose isSpecLifecycleItem + lifecycleContextValue stubs; added jest.mock('./specContextManager') with a controllable readSpecContextSync; updated makeItem factory to accept contextValue (default spec-active); updated existing reactivate test to use spec-completed items + queue completed-status reads; added three new tests (markCompleted no-op, mixed reactivate filtering, resolveTargets accepts lifecycle viewItems and rejects spec-document/spec-related-doc).

concerns.note: SpecStatus type does not include 'tasks-done'; lifecycleContextValue casts status to string to keep that case reachable.
Subagent missed updating the contextValue filter to recognize the new lifecycle viewItems; fixed in a follow-up edit.

approach: Encode each spec tree item's lifecycle group directly into its contextValue so right-click menu when clauses become a pure per-item decision and no longer race with VS Code's selection update.

specify.key_finding: Selection-based context keys (speckit.specs.selection.allActive/allCompleted/allArchived) already exist but race with VS Code's right-click selection update; per-item viewItem encoding eliminates the race entirely.

plan.approach_summary: Encode each spec tree item's lifecycle group directly into its contextValue so right-click menu when clauses become a pure per-item decision and no longer race with VS Code's selection update.
risks: Many === 'spec' strict comparisons in specExplorerProvider.ts and specCommands.ts could be missed; mitigate with a single isSpecLifecycleItem helper and a follow-up grep.
Stale when clause referencing a deprecated selection context key could escape the package.json sweep; mitigate with a post-edit grep for speckit.specs.selection.allActive|allCompleted|allArchived.
